assignment.title: Fingerprint Case Studies Assignment
assignment.instructor_text:
Fingerprint analysis has been used in many crime scenes as individualized evidence to tie a suspect to a crime scene.  The analysis of fingerprint evidence has been used in many historical cases.  You will examine some of these cases in the following assignment.

Complete the following assignment about using finger print analysis to solve crimes.  If you need a refresher on how to cite sources, please check out the How to Cite Sources tab in the Course Information section. Click on the image below to make a copy of the Fingerprint Analysis Case Studies Assignment.  Remember to double click on the header to open it and add your name to the document.

When you have completed your assignment, upload your file below and click on the Submit button.

If you need a refresher on how to submit your assignments, you can find the instructions in the Course Information section.
